_comment: Data row has 6 fields against a 7-column header (max_monthly_hours missing) -- this is a FILE-LEVEL framing problem, not a per-row one: parseWorkersCsv() throws CsvRowShapeError synchronously, before CsvImportService.importCsv ever creates an ImportTask or enters the per-row loop. Shape is deliberately different from the failedRows-array fixtures above.
call: parseWorkersCsv(csvText) -- throws before importCsv's per-row loop is reached
